mapper.select: SELECT id, name, datasource_type, connect_mode, host, port, database_name, db_username, db_password, created_at FROM bi_datasource ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bi_datasource (name, datasource_type, connect_mode, host, port, database_name, db_username, db_password) VALUES (#{name}, #{datasourceType}, #{connectMode}, #{host}, #{port}, #{databaseName}, #{dbUsername}, #{dbPassword})
